LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Advanced_Weapons.descri: Military holotape containing the schematics and manufacturing processes for the Brotherhood Advanced Weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Advanced_Weapons.label: holotape file: Brotherhood advanced weapons
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Elder_Regalia.descripti: Ceremonial robes and equipment befitting a Brotherhood Elder - the leaders of the organization.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Elder_Regalia.label: elder regalia
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Initiate_Equipment.desc: Basic uniforms and equipment for Brotherhood initiates and squires beginning their service.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Knight_Equipment.descri: Standard combat armor and fatigues used by Brotherhood Knights.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Knight_Equipment.label: knight equipment
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Outcast_Equipment.descr: Research the specialized equipment used by the Brotherhood Outcasts, including their distinctive armor and gear modifications.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Outcast_Equipment.label: Brotherhood outcast equipment
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Paladin_Training.descri: Unlock advanced paladin equipment and power armor operation training for elite Brotherhood warriors.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Paladin_Training.label: paladin training
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Scribe_Attire.descripti: Specialized robes and field uniforms for the Brotherhood's scribes - those who preserve and study technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Scribe_Attire.label: scribe attire
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Sentinel.description: The highest rank of Brotherhood warriors. Sentinels are masters of combat and paragons of the Brotherhood's ideals.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Sentinel.label: sentinel training
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Specialized_Armor.descr: Advanced combat armor variants including recon armor and reinforced combat armor for specialized missions.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Specialized_Armor.label: specialized knight armor
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Advanced_Equipment.descriptio: Advanced equipment used by Caesar's Legion veterans and centurions.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Advanced_Equipment.label: legion advanced equipment
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Basic_Equipment.description: Basic equipment used by Caesar's Legion recruits and legionaries.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Basic_Equipment.label: legion basic equipment
Advanced study of Enclave technology allows for the production of their sophisticated scientific equipment and combat armor with integrated systems.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Enclave_Advanced_Plasma_Wea: Military holotape containing the schematics and manufacturing processes for the Enclave Advanced Plasma Weapons.
holotape file: Enclave advanced plasma weapons
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Enclave_Advanced_Power_Armo: Military holotape containing the schematics and manufacturing processes for the Enclave Advanced Power Armor. This cutting-edge armor represents the pinnacle of pre-war engineering, offering exceptional protection and mobility.
holotape file: Enclave advanced power armor

Military holotape containing the schematics and manufacturing processes for the Enclave Advanced Power Armor MkII. This improved variant features enhanced environmental sealing and durability for prolonged combat scenarios.
holotape file: Enclave advanced power armor MkII
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Enclave_Basic_Equipment.des: Study captured Enclave equipment to understand their manufacturing techniques and replicate basic uniforms and equipment used by Enclave personnel.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Great_Khan_Armory.descripti: Research and develop the armor and equipment used by the Great Khans. Learn to craft their distinctive tribal armor, reinforced leathers, and elite gear that combines style with protection in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Great_Khan_Armory.label: great khan armory
LanguageData.FCP_Research_NCR_Civilian_Outfitters.des: Research and develop the clothes used by the various civilians working for the NCR, ensuring they are suitable for different civilian roles and activities.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_NCR_Heavy_Trooper_Corps.des: Research and develop techniques to salvage and repurpose power armor for enhanced protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_NCR_Presidential_Suite.desc: Research and develop the clothes fit for the president of the NCR, ensuring they are suitable for various formal and diplomatic occasions.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_NCR_Ranger_Corps.descriptio: Research and develop the advanced armor and equipment used by the NCR Ranger Corps, ensuring they are well-prepared for various reconnaissance and combat missions.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_NCR_Ranger_Corps.label: ranger corps
LanguageData.FCP_Research_NCR_Ranger_Elite_Corps.desc: Research and develop the elite armor and equipment used by the NCR Elite Ranger Corps, ensuring they are equipped with the best possible gear for high-risk reconnaissance and combat missions.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_NCR_Special_Forces.descript: Research and develop advanced armor for the NCR Special Operations Forces, providing enhanced protection and capabilities for elite soldiers.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_NCR_Special_Forces.label: special operations forces
Research and develop the basic equipment and uniforms used by the NCR standard troopers, ensuring they are well-prepared for various combat scenarios.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_NCR_Trooper_Variations.desc: Research and develop variations of the standard trooper equipment, providing specialized gear for different combat scenarios.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_PRC_Advanced_Equipment.desc: Research and develop the advanced technology behind Chinese stealth suits and specialized naval equipment. These cutting-edge designs represent the pinnacle of pre-war Chinese engineering, incorporating stealth technology, environmental protection, and enhanced combat capabilities.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_PRC_Standard_Uniforms.descr: Research and develop the various uniforms used by the People's Republic of China's civilian and military personnel, ranging from basic jumpsuits to specialized winter gear. These versatile designs emphasize practicality, durability, and adaptability to harsh conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_PRC_Standard_Uniforms.label: chinese standard uniforms
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Hotrodder_FlameJob.descript: A dazzling flame paint scheme for power armor that turns heads and strikes fear into the hearts of enemies. This iconic hot rod design brings wasteland style to the battlefield.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Hotrodder_FlameJob.label: hotrodder flame job
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Hotrodder_Hotpink.descripti: Bold, vibrant hot pink paint for power armor. This eye-catching color scheme makes a statement and ensures you'll never be overlooked on the battlefield.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Hotrodder_Hotpink.label: hotrodder hotpink
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Hotrodder_SharkPaint.descri: Menacing shark teeth painted on power armor in the style of pre-war fighter planes. Show your enemies you mean business with this aggressive paint scheme.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Hotrodder_SharkPaint.label: hotrodder shark paint
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Power_Paints_Abraxo.descrip: A paint scheme inspired by the iconic Abraxo Cleaner branding. Clean, crisp, and unmistakable - this corporate paint job brings pre-war advertising aesthetics to your power armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Power_Paints_Abraxo.label: power paints abraxo
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Power_Paints_SugarBombs.des: Colorful Sugar Bombs cereal branding applied to power armor. Sweet and explosive, this playful paint scheme combines nostalgia with intimidation.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Raider_Equipment.descriptio: Research and develop the armor and equipment used by raiders. Learn to craft their distinctive tribal armor, reinforced leathers, and elite gear that combines style with protection in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Raider_Equipment.label: raider equipment
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Advanced_Agriculture.descri: Research into advanced techniques for improving agricultural productivity and crop yields.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Advanced_Agriculture.label: advanced agriculture
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Advanced_Food_Production.de: Research into advanced techniques for food production and preservation.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Advanced_Gunsmithing.descri: Holotape containing the schematics for various advanced firearms.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Advanced_Gunsmithing.label: holotape file: advanced gunsmithing
Research into the techniques and methods for producing advanced medical equipment.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Advanced_Weapons_Manufactur: Research into the development and implementation of security measures suitable for the wasteland environment.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Ammo_Workbench.description: Research into the development and implementation of energy-based defensive systems for enhanced security.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Ammo_Workbench.label: ammo workbench
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Apparel_Production.descript: Research into the techniques and methods for producing various types of apparel.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Apparel_Production.label: apparel production
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Armor_Production.descriptio: Research into the techniques and methods for producing various types of armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Armor_Production.label: armor production
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Auto_Doc.description: Research into the techniques and methods for producing Auto Docs.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Auto_Doc.label: auto doc
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Automated_Defenses.descript: Research into the techniques and methods for producing automated defenses.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Automated_Defenses.label: automated defenses
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Basic_Agriculture.descripti: Research into the cultivation and farming of various plant species.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Basic_Agriculture.label: basic agriculture
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Basic_Furniture.description: Research into the creation and use of basic furniture for improved living conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Basic_Furniture.label: basic furniture
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Basic_Weapons_Manufacturing: Research into the development and use of advanced medical equipment for improved healthcare and treatment.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BrocXander_Refinement.descr: Research into the development and implementation of a spore carrier program for enhanced fungal growth and distribution.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BrocXander_Refinement.label: broc flower and xander root refinement
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Buffout_Production.descript: Research into the techniques and methods for producing Buffout.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Buffout_Production.label: Buffout production
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Bunker_Living.description: Research into the techniques and methods for living in bunkers.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Bunker_Living.label: bunker living
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BusinessWear.description: Holotape containing the schematics and patterns for pre-war business attire, including suits and formal wear.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BusinessWear.label: holotape file: pre-War businesswear
LanguageData.FCP_Research_CasualWear.description: Holotape containing the patterns and instructions for making casual pre-war clothing such as shirts, pants, and dresses.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_CasualWear.label: holotape file: pre-War casual wear
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Chem_Combinations.descripti: Research into the techniques and methods for combining various types of chems.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Chem_Combinations.label: chem combinations
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Chem_Production.description: Research into the techniques and methods for producing various types of chems.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Chem_Production.label: chem production
LanguageData.FCP_Research_CombatArmorStandard.descrip: Holotape containing the schematics for standard issue combat armor used by pre-war military forces.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_CombatArmorStandard.label: holotape file: combat armor standard
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Complex_Furniture.descripti: Research into the techniques and methods for producing complex furniture.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Complex_Furniture.label: complex furniture
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Correctional_Security.descr: Research into the techniques and methods for providing correctional security.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Correctional_Security.label: correctional security
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Costumes.description: Holotape containing the designs and instructions for crafting pre-war costumes and themed outfits.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Costumes.label: holotape file: pre-War costumes
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Crafting_Stations.descripti: Research into the creation and use of complex furniture for enhanced living conditions and comfort.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Crafting_Stations.label: crafting stations
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Culinary_Creation.descripti: Research into advanced culinary techniques and recipes for creating high-quality meals.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Culinary_Creation.label: culinary creation
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Energy_Based_Weaponry.descr: Holotape containing the schematics for basic energy weapons weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Energy_Based_Weaponry.label: holotape file: energy based weaponry
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Energy_Weapon_Defenses.desc: Research into the techniques and methods for producing energy weapon defenses.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Fabricated_Walls_And_Securi: Research into the techniques and methods for producing fabricated walls and security systems.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Food_Production.description: Research into the techniques and methods for efficient food production and preservation.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Food_Production.label: food production
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Gauss_Weapons_Manufacturing: Holotape containing the schematics for gauss weapons utilizing electromagnetic acceleration technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Gunsmithing.description: Holotape containing the schematics for various firearms.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Gunsmithing.label: holotape file: gunsmithing
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Healing_Powder.description: Research into the creation and use of healing powder for medical purposes.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Healing_Powder.label: healing powder
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Honey_Mesquite_Sowing.descr: Research into the cultivation and sowing of Honey Mesquite trees.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Honey_Mesquite_Sowing.label: honey mesquite sowing
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Jet_Production.description: Research into the techniques and methods for producing Jet.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Jet_Production.label: Jet production
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Lab_Grown_Produce.descripti: Research into the techniques and methods for growing produce in a controlled lab environment.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Lab_Grown_Produce.label: lab grown produce
Holotape containing the schematics for manufacturing laser weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Makeshift_Fortifications.de: Research into the techniques and methods for producing makeshift fortifications.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Makeshift_Laser_Weapons.des: Research into the techniques and methods for producing makeshift laser weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Makeshift_Weapons.descripti: Research into the development and construction of fabricated walls and security systems for enhanced protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Makeshift_Weapons.label: makeshift weapons
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Medicinal_Drugs.description: Research into the development and production of medicinal drugs for treating various ailments.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Medicinal_Drugs.label: medicinal drugs
LanguageData.FCP_Research_MedX_Production.description: Research into the techniques and methods for producing Med-X.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_MedX_Production.label: Med-X production
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Mentat_Production.descripti: Research into the techniques and methods for producing Mentats.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Mentat_Production.label: mentat production
LanguageData.FCP_Research_MilitaryUniforms.descriptio: Holotape containing the schematics and patterns for crafting pre-war military uniforms and gear.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_MilitaryUniforms.label: holotape file: pre-War military uniforms
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Mushroom_Farming.descriptio: Research into the creation and cultivation of spores for advanced agricultural purposes.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Mushroom_Farming.label: mushroom farming
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Plasma_Weapons_Manufacturin: Holotape containing the schematics for plasma weapons weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Power_Armor_Applications.de: Research into the techniques and methods for utilizing power armor in various applications.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Power_Armor_Training.descri: Holotape containing training protocols and operational procedures for power armor usage.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Power_Armor_Training.label: holotape file: power armor training
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Psycho_Production.descripti: Research into the techniques and methods for producing Psycho.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Psycho_Production.label: Psycho production
LanguageData.FCP_Research_RadAway_Manufacturing.descr: Research into the techniques and methods for producing Rad-Away.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_RadAway_Manufacturing.label: rad-away manufacturing
Research into the techniques and methods for developing and maintaining Radiation King electronics.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Radiation_Radios.descriptio: Research into the development and maintenance of Radiation Radios for improved communication and entertainment in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Radiation_Radios.label: radiation radios
LanguageData.FCP_Research_RadX_Production.description: Research into the techniques and methods for producing Rad-X.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_RadX_Production.label: rad-x production
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Sleeping_Bags.description: Research into the techniques and methods for producing sleeping bags suitable for the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Sleeping_Bags.label: wasteland sleeping bags
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Spore_Carrier_Program.descr: Research into advanced methods for spore distribution and carrier systems.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Spore_Carrier_Program.label: spore carrier program
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Spore_Creation.description: Research into advanced methods and technologies for producing high-quality food efficiently.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Spore_Creation.label: spore creation
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Stimpak_Production.descript: Research into the techniques and methods for producing Stimpaks.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Stimpak_Production.label: stimpak production
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Beds.description: Research into the techniques and methods for producing beds suitable for the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Beds.label: wasteland beds
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Electronics.descr: Research into the techniques and methods for producing electronics suitable for the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Electronics.label: wasteland electronics
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Furnishings.descr: Research into the techniques and methods for producing furnishings suitable for the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Furnishings.label: wasteland furnishings
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Lighting.descript: Research into the techniques and methods for producing lighting solutions suitable for the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Lighting.label: wasteland lighting
Research into the techniques and methods for generating power in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Power_Supply.desc: Research into the techniques and methods for supplying power in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Security.descript: Research into the techniques and methods for providing security in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Security.label: wasteland security
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Storage.descripti: Research into the creation and use of storage solutions suitable for the harsh conditions of the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Storage.label: wasteland storage
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Wasteland_Wind_Turbines.des: Research into the techniques and methods for developing wind turbines in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_VATS.label: V.A.T.S.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_USA_Infantry_Variations.des: Create specialized uniforms and equipment for Army units, including winter warfare, engineers, and medics, tailored to the diverse needs of the U.S. military.
Create specialized uniforms and equipment for Marine Corps units, ensuring they are prepared for amphibious and expeditionary warfare.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_USA_Mechanized_Infantry_Cor: Modernize the U.S. Army with mechanized divisions, integrating power armor to enhance mobility and battlefield dominance.
Equip the United States Army with regulation uniforms gear and weapons, ensuring every soldier is prepared for service at home and abroad in defense of American interests.
